textByHashes.6576dfe4ffb540c24bb7158f37a3ac7e6d8d409b: ... and with the guidance of Ralos and Ranul, who stand beside us in our fight, we will be victorious!
textByHashes.d90f8fe362709526d283395598b82a8370822931: I know recent setbacks have you questioning. I know you have concerns. You need not whisper them in the shadows, for you are free to question. More than that, you are encouraged to question!
textByHashes.6972276e2d01fb0514173e1414860ffe7deed447: After all, was it not your questions that brought you here? Did you not dare to ask them while others shied away in fear?
textByHashes.df3fa7f9026bb7cdc3c61e6e60391389cbdcdebe: Remember this: We are the doubters! We are the outcasts! Society shunned us for it, but only those who question everything will ever find the truth.
textByHashes.cba6443d8ec262f0e35c09c2e32c6999787a604d: And that truth? That is what we fight for. That is what will bring about the Final Dawn!
textByHashes.cbd6e641fa4bc041c9fd1fd5049da5d9fc0919d8: Let me now assure you, these setbacks have done nothing to stop us! The road to Mokhaiotl is clearer than ever! We have no need for the Teokan any more!
textByHashes.00859bc9e93d0b130f49a593d59b8479fa0a5a5a: See how the rulers of this kingdom are powerless against us. Itzla Arkan, heir to the throne of Varlamore, is now our prisoner!
textByHashes.4ad9b6f94c811c1bd99ce1307cb10bb6d03e3faa: People like you always fear the truth. Do you know why? Because without your lies, all that you do, all that you live for, is meaningless.
textByHashes.7058455e3a98c92ca95ab79aec64ffe522246145: But your fear, it can now end. Here, you finally have a purpose. Here, you can finally serve Ralos and Ranul.
textByHashes.2487d01b72b7f974d7485978a6af025ecbe1c895: Do you not see? The blood of the Teokan runs through your veins. You are now the key to the Final Dawn!
textByHashes.fca6a0e0c8ebe3d2932f41ae4ebdbe6b037690e1: Listen to the anger in his voice. It is a poor attempt to mask his fear. We need not fear though, for our purpose is clear.
textByHashes.78dd10899377d1f24b325114aacec5e988ffd233: Go now, for time is short, and there is much left to do. It will soon be time to deliver Twilight's Promise. It will soon be time for the Final Dawn!
textByHashes.70c8ad3505966b24c100627afbe41afe3440cf91: The Queen will not dare put her son in danger. Your worries are unfounded. Besides, I've already made arrangements for him to be moved elsewhere.
textByHashes.b3a68153e5787be815522aaf4344b2509796a2e8: And if the opportunity presents itself, Servius will still make for a valid option. The trick here isn't to have one plan, it's to have many. We have enough options available that one of them will bear fruit.
textByHashes.73e70498dc4c85d1396abcc117e7532a61bff1bd: You should have more faith, Furia. Look at your brother. He's a true believer now.
textByHashes.a8af387638d7aae9b92c4ca74d958ca8cbfc3f3b: Good job we have many uses for fools then...
textByHashes.166b3061a21fdf7e8b27c22fb27ae4ece8f7e284: Ah, the outsider. I see you survived your encounter with the nagua.
textByHashes.f42179957b9e62ce322f6de1181667272802bd43: Clearly. It's a shame you've chosen to fight against the truth. One such as yourself would have served us well.
textByHashes.ddaec889f8ac565ca89c5dd8dd756d64ae6d305c: Still, no matter. The Final Dawn will soon be upon us, and it will see us all become equal in servitude to our gods.
textByHashes.ae3a965cd8611a635808ef02e35ba5b02d50de3a: You two, guide this one to Mictl. Be sure not to underestimate him.
textByHashes.0cbfc81f07fef15ee72ba1bea2e3256c701ff845: You two, guide this one to Mictl. Be sure not to underestimate her.
textByHashes.d90c385e98676d4594e490738f0e9a994a604f0c: You two, guide this one to Mictl. Be sure not to underestimate them.
textByHashes.dc6c64e0f573ed63acbde88ded78dc5736562ddf: Running? What do you think I'm running from? After all this time, I'm finally right where I need to be.
textByHashes.4a38d7b880070cd31bfd932a41c0c02390e93af8: The Final Dawn? Don't you see? There never was a Final Dawn. There never will be a Final Dawn.
textByHashes.10d461da93d1b09afa7d319a56c7180727c0bcff: Why? Quite simply because they let me.
textByHashes.53a84f77ae1324e2d67194cedb9e722c25f22eef: Mad? Of course I'm mad! So many see madness as a weakness... As a burden. But to do what I do... To seek what I seek... Insanity is the only way one can ever walk that path.
textByHashes.72e330cf59950988c9da91b3cfb9b2ce168c1f4e: The people of this land... Their lives are built upon the truths presented to them. Ralos... Ranul... They put their faith in the gods they are told to believe in.
textByHashes.e2006f4dd49b0c703c01b305a1ec629d6015b071: From their first cries to their dying breaths, every choice they make is built upon those foundations. Foundations that have become so ingrained, that no sane person would ever question them.
textByHashes.a88e4766a3cba03dde00e1774813a3089a24a5c8: You have some, like the Emissaries, who dance on the edge of madness, but never leap into its embrace.
textByHashes.c6203855cb9a04b2b1aa8a91db4bf679d902c82d: It was never truth that they sought. They just took comfort in someone telling them what they wanted to hear.
textByHashes.e2c3d0081c46e48c7e735a8bc1d6e201f126d524: And so it falls to me. We stand here in Mokhaiotl, the last archive of the Old Ones. When their doom befell them, they did not pray, they preserved.
textByHashes.b1d603962d39554367d7953d76d0edbd97691f43: They housed their collective knowledge, their collective power, right here. For years it's sat waiting... Waiting for a worthy inheritor. Waiting... for me.
textByHashes.b23a1c211f5d94e4791752e653cdb714243eef4a: Here, today, I will shatter the foundations that the sane never question. I will uncover the realities they shy away from. And in my madness, I will finally deliver that which the world has forgotten.
textByHashes.438b3c971673faa94425d6771a79c05ba3866ef2: Today, I will be the one to finally find the truth.
textByHashes.66e0344431f97ebdd7c4d6bb27025b113076bc5c: Never! I've fought too hard for this!
textByHashes.d7d003b4faa3f3119a264f17f112fa9ab05ce799: No! I won't let you stop me now!
textByHashes.5de365a937cd771a59bceef410abcaa856280136: But the Old Ones... This was their archive... Their gift...
textByHashes.734de0f0a90a011552c9292fed55d5ff864ff32f: This morning, you were nothing more than ants, scrambling to find purpose amongst the dirt. Now though... now you have achieved ascension.
textByHashes.d3167bff143543e88ed5330c165b2da2dee88b43: Once, I was just the same. Like so many of you, I started my life with nothing. I would wake each morning and pray that I would find enough food to last through the day.
textByHashes.090d447baee8cbc0748e9db1b9c54a0f84afeca1: All the while, those above me treated me worse than a common criminal. I was a villain to them! Why? Simply because they were born with privilege, and I was not.
textByHashes.90d12a6b34a1585ea3030dfe18179bf45d084d62: Eventually, I looked to the Sect of Ranul for guidance. I thought they might have shown me my path, but I was wrong.
textByHashes.eab604236c410d03d3ac0780968071360e6856cd: Before long, I was their leader and it was instead me who was being looked to for guidance, for purpose. In truth though, even then I had nothing I could offer. I was as blind as I had always been.
textByHashes.9450cd42458c1d767aef2b13165b8145a46c50f8: But the day came when I finally saw my purpose, for I was blessed with a vision, granted to me by Ralos and Ranul themselves! I will share now with you what they shared with me.
textByHashes.a942623e1ddc22f407e2cdfd1a262760a662254b: Thirty one years ago, the moon eclipsed the sun and a false night fell across the land. That day marked a beginning, for it saw the birth of a pair of twins.
textByHashes.ff5ec7d6dbe623b02d19ba7a97dbc5980846cfec: To most, they were children like any other, but I was shown the truth of their birth, for as the sun and moon combined, Ralos and Ranul were born in mortal forms!
textByHashes.0a12127a9ef3642a9ee7235bdbb67ab623e33d1c: Now, they seek Mokhaiotl. There, they will unite us all as one, and a new world will be born. My purpose, which I now share with you, is to lead them there.
textByHashes.871fc7e0833704240f1a520269f131474d0e9a45: Blasphemy! Deceit! That is what people cry when they hear the truth. The Church of Ralos teaches that our work is false, and our royal leaders lap up their every word!
textByHashes.bf38ce402726b163ecea40003292b7ac12635f99: Perhaps you still harbour doubts yourselves. I do not judge you. We have all been lied to our entire lives, and in truth, even after I was blessed by our gods, I held many doubts myself.
textByHashes.ff54f97e5672ea32ad4d38b2d91f37b3b7141fed: But you have all been chosen. You have all achieved ascension. I know that you are among the few who will understand. You are among the few who can see the truth!
textByHashes.5a8885eeca240c73c30d6aa59552dff873b37a60: And see it you will! You do not need to take the word of a mere herald. Instead, bask in the glory of our gods reborn!
textByHashes.226f40877a6d1ba7a9dd8a712742d42fcdaf22ac: You may recognise these faces as Ennius and Furia Tullus, but now I give you the truth. Before you stand our gods! Ralos and Ranul!
textByHashes.2dadf9e277e2e331a76570932f5199a343a7a322: Together, we will accompany them on their glorious journey! We will guide them to Mokhaiotl and bring about the Final Dawn! This is our purpose! This is our destiny! This is Twilight's Promise!
textByHashes.42e609623a52f43ffbaf64547549042b2d333329: You all have a part to play in what is to come. Forebearer Fides will assign you your duties. Speak with her and then go forth. Go forth and serve our gods!
textByHashes.df5324675f0f6ae0840ee7c924772597707d1d9e: Itzla? He is no longer your concern.
textByHashes.cca1de937306bac10e923153ee1ab41b12140892: There is nothing more for us here. If the nagua wants blood, our friend here will provide plenty...
